description.div: Dashe is a district of the city of Kaohsiung, Taiwan. The term "she" (社) was used in Qing dynasty to refer to Indigenous settlements. Hence "Dashe" (大社) referred to a large Indigenous settlment. The district consists of the villages Jiacheng, Baoshe (保社), Baoan, Dashe, Cuibing, Sannai, Guanyin, Shennong, and Zhongli. A cementery where Baoshe (保社) is used as frequent place name is located at Qinan Road.
